## Browser Issue

**What browser issue did you encounter?**

**Browser information**
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge]
- Version: [e.g. 120.0.6099.109]
- Operating system: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Browser engine: [e.g. Blink, Gecko, WebKit, EdgeHTML]

**Where did you encounter this issue?**
- [ ] Header
- [ ] Navigation
- [ ] Content sections
- [ ] Forms
- [ ] JavaScript functionality
- [ ] CSS styling
- [ ] Media playback
- [ ] Animations
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Extensions
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Steps to reproduce**
1. Open the website in [Browser Name]
2. Navigate to '...'
3. Perform action '...'
4. See issue

**Expected behavior**
What should happen in this browser?

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened in this browser?

**Console errors**
```
Paste any console errors here
```

**Network issues**
- [ ] Failed requests
- [ ] Slow loading
- [ ] CORS errors
- [ ] Cache issues
- [ ] SSL/TLS issues
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Browser-specific features**
- [ ] Extensions enabled
- [ ] Developer tools open
- [ ] Incognito/Private mode
- [ ] Custom settings
- [ ] Hardware acceleration
- [ ] Other (please specify)

**Screenshots**
If possible, add screenshots to help illustrate the browser issue.

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the browser issue here.

**Priority level**
- [ ] Critical (unusable in browser)
- [ ] High (major functionality broken)
- [ ] Medium (moderate issues)
- [ ] Low (minor inconvenience)

**Note**: Browser compatibility is important for all users!

**Note**: Different browsers may handle features differently!

**Note**: Test in multiple browsers and versions for comprehensive coverage!

**Note**: Consider browser market share when prioritizing fixes!

**Note**: Progressive enhancement helps ensure compatibility!
